title: Returning nothing from multi-select function
symptom: The function fails to create multiple objects from a multi-select input, resulting in undefined values being returned.
applies_when: Binding to an API that expects multiple objects
not_this_if: Only one item is selected in the multi-select
root_cause: The function was incorrectly structured, leading to a return statement that outputs nothing. This happens when the return keyword is not properly placed, causing the function to return undefined instead of the expected object array.
fix_steps: Move the return keyword to precede the mapping function
Ensure the mapping function correctly formats the selected values into objects
Test the function with multiple selections
agent_instruction: Adjust the return statement to properly format the multi-select input into an array of objects.
